summary: White-glove team missed the promised morning delivery window.
carrierNotes: Linehaul arrived at DEN terminal at 11:47 MDT after crew dispatch cutoff. Freight is intact and staged in bay 12.
customerImpact: Customer expected delivery today before hosting guests this weekend.
slaRisk: High risk of service recovery failure if not rebooked within 24 hours.
recommendedAction: Offer earliest white-glove recovery slot and waive upgrade fee.

summary: Partial shipment risk: two cartons are at the Boston terminal and two are still inbound.
carrierNotes: Terminal scan shows base cartons received. Upper shelf cartons missed EWR departure and are due on next linehaul.
customerImpact: Customer cannot assemble the bookshelf unless all cartons arrive together.
slaRisk: Medium-high risk of failed appointment and second delivery charge.
recommendedAction: Hold local cartons, merge freight, and rebook one complete delivery.

summary: Delivery attempt failed because freight elevator access was not available.
carrierNotes: Driver waited 18 minutes. Building staff denied access without resident elevator booking.
customerImpact: Customer needs to coordinate building access before the next attempt.
slaRisk: Medium risk; shipment can be recovered if customer confirms elevator window.
recommendedAction: Offer two reattempt windows and ask customer to confirm elevator booking.

summary: Original carrier has no white-glove crew capacity for the promised table delivery window.
carrierNotes: AM Home Delivery rejected appointment due to two-person crew shortage. Freight is available at ORD-WG-01.
customerImpact: Dining table delivery may slip past promised date unless moved to partner carrier.
slaRisk: High risk because item requires room-of-choice placement and narrow-stair handling.
recommendedAction: Move to partner white-glove carrier with next-day crew availability.

summary: Carrier cannot complete delivery without gate code and access confirmation.
carrierNotes: Driver notes steep driveway and missing gate code. Dispatch requests customer confirmation before reattempt.
customerImpact: Delivery will not proceed until customer provides access details.
slaRisk: Critical risk of storage fees if not resolved before terminal cutoff.
recommendedAction: Contact customer for gate code, then rebook local LTL reattempt.

summary: Denver route delay caused by severe weather and local road closures.
carrierNotes: RXO paused final-mile routes north of I-70. Freight remains on delivery truck and is expected to return to terminal tonight.
customerImpact: Customer expected afternoon delivery and prefers another afternoon window.
slaRisk: Medium risk; weather exception qualifies for proactive ETA reset.
recommendedAction: Offer next available afternoon slot and acknowledge weather safety delay.

summary: Carrier missed original Atlanta white-glove pickup.
carrierNotes: Recovered by J.B. Hunt Final Mile and rebooked for 2026-05-29.
customerImpact: Customer accepted new Friday afternoon slot.
resolution: Rescheduled for 2026-05-29 13:00-17:00 EDT and customer accepted the new appointment.
